speaker: Blanche
text: So you're telling me there's a worm inside my body?

speaker: Doctor
text: There isn’t just one worm, there's a few. From what it seems, I believe that it may be a simple roundworm infection.

speaker: Blanche
text: We had so much fun together.

speaker: Narrator
text: Blanche never did take that medicine. Something compelled her not to.
